command:
cd /Users/kai/Documents/Projects/Hyo && echo '=== FEED REPORTS ===' && python3 -c "
import json
with open('agents/sam/website/data/feed.json') as f:
    data = json.load(f)
print(f'Agents: {len(data[\"agents\"])} ({\", \".join(data[\"agents\"].keys())})')
print(f'Reports: {len(data[\"reports\"])}')
for r in data['reports']:
    print(f'  {r[\"id\"]} | {r[\"author\"]} | {r[\"type\"]} | {r[\"timestamp\"]}')
" && echo '=== DISPATCH STATUS ===' && bash bin/dispatch.sh status 2>/dev/null | head -20 && echo '=== LAUNCHD ===' && launchctl list | grep com.hyo
